final:
// // This SRAM cell reads data when write enable is high and writes data when read enable is high.
module sram_cell (
    input [3:0] d,
    input we,
    input re,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory <= d; // Write data to memory
        end
        if (re) begin
            q <= memory; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This SRAM cell reads data when write enable is high and writes data when read enable is high.
